title: Gui Bites
description: Gives health and hunger better visual animations and optionally changes the look of the hotbar and exp bar (Latest Release), plus other changes.
body: As this pack is quite small, the intention is combine it with other packs. Enjoy. > Health gain: > Health loss - (OLD - The white bar under health has been removed!) > Hunger loss > Horse health loss (reverse like above as well) > Air loss: > Removes the Insecure Chat Toast Message as they can get spammy on servers. > Cleans up a few menus + containers by removing their titles. ( 1 and 1.2 Only ) __________________________________ Credits: Inspired by Trolek's [ [Gembars](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/gembars-1-19/) ] and button design (In versions 1 & 1.2) influenced by Enchanted_Games [ [Bedrock Preview UI](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/bedrock-preview-ui-java-edition/) ]
